description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof with weathered brown shingles and a prominent central peak, giving it a rustic, storybook appearance. The exterior walls are clad in dark wooden planks, and the structure includes a stone chimney with visible aging and discoloration. Windows are sparse and asymmetrically placed, with a single square window on the front gable and a larger window on the side. A covered porch with a slanted roof extends from one side, supported by simple posts, and the overall silhouette is irregular with multiple rooflines intersecting. The house appears compact, with a single main story and a possible attic or loft space under the steep roof. The design suggests a cozy, older residential building, likely found in a suburban or rural neighborhood.
description: A rustic, dark wooden house with a steep gable roof, stone chimney, and asymmetrical windows. Features a covered porch and weathered exterior, evoking a cozy, storybook charm.
description_view_0: Front view shows the steep gable roof, central square window, and the covered porch with chimney visible on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the intersecting rooflines and the shingled roof texture, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view displays another gable peak, a side window, and the stone chimney more prominently.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the porch roof, chimney, and the overall compactness of the structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple covered porch with a slanted roof, no visible columns, and a single main door under the gable.
